name: LaMDA
license: Proprietary (Google; research model, weights never released)
note: 137B dialogue-specialized decoder-only Transformer; predecessor behind Google's original Bard chatbot.
verificationNotes: Confirmed real via arxiv.org/abs/2201.08239 (submitted 2022-01-20, the research writeup) which literally states LaMDA models have 'up to 137B parameters' -- matches paramsB. Confirmed public unveiling date 2021-05-18 at Google I/O via blog.google/technology/ai/lamda/ and corroborating press (9to5google, VentureBeat) all dated May 18, 2021. Closed/proprietary status and 'weights never released' are well-established and uncontested. Could not independently confirm the exact 2K context-length figure from a primary source in this pass (left as-is, low confidence); no results rows were present to check. No changes made to core fields.
